sEn: HunyuanVideo 1.5 achieves state-of-the-art video generation with only 8.3B parameters, enabling efficient inference on consumer GPUs.
sZh: HunyuanVideo 1.5 仅用83亿参数实现顶尖视频生成质量，可在消费级GPU上高效推理。
absEn: We present HunyuanVideo 1.5, a lightweight yet powerful open-source video generation model that achieves state-of-the-art visual quality and motion coherence with only 8.3 billion parameters, enabling efficient inference on consumer-grade GPUs. This achievement is built upon several key components, including meticulous data curation, an advanced DiT architecture featuring selective and sliding tile attention (SSTA), enhanced bilingual understanding through glyph-aware text encoding, progressive pre-training and post-training, and an efficient video super-resolution network. Leveraging these designs, we developed a unified framework capable of high-quality text-to-video and image-to-video generation across multiple durations and resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this compact and proficient model establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source video generation models. By releasing the code and model weights, we provide the community with a high-performance foundation that lowers the barrier to video creation and research, making advanced video generation accessible to a broader audience. All open-source assets are publicly available at https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5.
absZh: 我们提出了HunyuanVideo 1.5，一个轻量级但功能强大的开源视频生成模型，仅用83亿参数就实现了最先进的视觉质量和运动连贯性，能够在消费级GPU上进行高效推理。这一成就建立在几个关键组件之上，包括精心设计的数据整理、采用选择性滑动窗口注意力（SSTA）的高级DiT架构、通过字形感知文本编码增强的双语理解、渐进式预训练和后训练，以及高效的视频超分辨率网络。利用这些设计，我们开发了一个统一的框架，能够跨多种时长和分辨率进行高质量的文本到视频和图像到视频生成。大量实验表明，这个紧凑而高效的模型在开源视频生成模型中树立了新的标杆。通过发布代码和模型权重，我们为社区提供了一个高性能基础，降低了视频创作和研究的门槛，使先进的视频生成技术惠及更广泛的受众。所有开源资源均可公开获取：https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5。

contrib.en: Proposes a lightweight 8.3B-parameter DiT with SSTA for efficient video generation on consumer GPUs.
contrib.zh: 提出轻量级8.3B参数DiT与SSTA，在消费级GPU上高效生成视频。

contrib.en: Introduces a two-stage pipeline: unified DiT for T2V/I2V and a video super-resolution network for 1080p upscaling.
contrib.zh: 引入两阶段流程：统一DiT用于文生视频/图生视频，以及视频超分网络提升至1080p。

contrib.en: Develops Selective and Sliding Tile Attention (SSTA) to prune redundant tokens, achieving 1.87x speedup.
contrib.zh: 开发选择性滑动块注意力（SSTA）剪枝冗余token，实现1.87倍加速。

contrib.en: Enhances bilingual understanding via Qwen2.5-VL and Glyph-ByT5 text encoders for accurate text rendering.
contrib.zh: 通过Qwen2.5-VL和Glyph-ByT5文本编码器增强双语理解，实现精准文本渲染。

contrib.en: Employs progressive pre-training and post-training (CT, SFT, RLHF) to improve motion coherence and alignment.
contrib.zh: 采用渐进式预训练和后训练（CT、SFT、RLHF）提升运动连贯性与对齐。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art open-source video generation with compact 8.3B parameters, lowering barriers for research.
contrib.zh: 以紧凑的8.3B参数实现开源视频生成最先进水平，降低研究门槛。

limits.en: Model performance is evaluated only on curated prompts and may degrade on out-of-distribution inputs.
limits.zh: 模型性能仅在精选提示上评估，在分布外输入上可能下降。

limits.en: Inference speed measurements use unoptimized research code; real-world deployment may require further engineering.
limits.zh: 推理速度测量使用未优化研究代码；实际部署可能需要进一步工程优化。

limits.en: The super-resolution network is trained on 1M clips; performance on unseen resolutions or durations is untested.
limits.zh: 超分网络在100万片段上训练；在未见分辨率或时长上的性能未经测试。

limits.en: Sparse attention (SSTA) is applied only during distillation; full training without it may yield different results.
limits.zh: 稀疏注意力（SSTA）仅在蒸馏阶段应用；无它时完整训练可能产生不同结果。

limits.en: The model is open-source but relies on proprietary data curation and captioning pipelines, limiting reproducibility.
limits.zh: 模型开源但依赖专有数据整理和标注流程，限制可复现性。

items.en: We present HunyuanVideo 1.5, a lightweight yet powerful open-source video generation model that achieves state-of-the-art visual quality and motion coherence with only 8.3 billion parameters, enabling efficient inference on consumer-grade GPUs. This achievement is built upon several key components, including meticulous data curation, an advanced DiT architecture featuring selective and sliding tile attention (SSTA), enhanced bilingual understanding through glyph-aware text encoding, progressive pre-training and post-training, and an efficient video super-resolution network. Leveraging these designs, we developed a unified framework capable of high-quality text-to-video and image-to-video generation across multiple durations and resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this compact and proficient model establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source video generation models. By releasing the code and model weights, we provide the community with a high-performance foundation that lowers the barrier to video creation and research, making advanced video generation accessible to a broader audience. All open-source assets are publicly available at https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5.
items.zh: 我们提出了 HunyuanVideo 1.5，一个轻量级但强大的开源视频生成模型，仅用 83 亿参数就实现了最先进的视觉质量和运动连贯性，能够在消费级 GPU 上进行高效推理。这一成就建立在几个关键组件之上，包括精细的数据整理、采用选择性滑动块注意力（SSTA）的先进 DiT 架构、通过字形感知文本编码增强的双语理解、渐进式预训练和后训练，以及高效的视频超分辨率网络。利用这些设计，我们开发了一个统一的框架，能够跨多种时长和分辨率进行高质量的文本到视频和图像到视频生成。大量实验表明，这个紧凑且高效的模型在开源视频生成模型中建立了新的最先进水平。通过发布代码和模型权重，我们为社区提供了一个高性能基础，降低了视频创作和研究的门槛，使先进的视频生成技术惠及更广泛的受众。所有开源资源可在 https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5 获取。

items.en: Recent years have witnessed remarkable advancements in video generation models, with closed-source systems like Kling2.5 [1], Veo3.1 [2], and Sora2 [3] achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance. In the open-source domain, models such as HunyuanVideo [4], StepVideo [5], and Wan2.2 [6] have emerged as notable contenders. However, despite these strides, most SOTA models remain proprietary, limiting accessibility and community-driven innovation. Wan2.2 [6] employs a hybrid Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture that leverages two 14-billion-parameter expert models to enhance video quality. Although this MoE architecture enhances visual fidelity by leveraging specialized experts for different denoising stages, it inherently introduces computational inefficiencies, as the model must manage multiple large parameter sets (totaling 27B parameters with 14B activated), leading to significant resource demands. While Wan2.2 [6] has attempted to address this with a more compact 5-billion-parameter variant, which utilizes a high-compression 3D VAE to reduce memory footprint, this lightweight model still exhibits limitations. Specifically, its generative capabilities, particularly in maintaining motion stability across frames and achieving the nuanced aesthetic quality required for professional applications, continue to fall short of practical demands. This situation underscores a critical gap: the absence of an open-source model that successfully balances high-quality output with efficient inference.
items.zh: 近年来，视频生成模型取得了显著进展，闭源系统如 Kling2.5 [1]、Veo3.1 [2] 和 Sora2 [3] 实现了最先进的性能。在开源领域，HunyuanVideo [4]、StepVideo [5] 和 Wan2.2 [6] 等模型已成为值得关注的竞争者。然而，尽管取得了这些进展，大多数最先进的模型仍然是专有的，限制了可访问性和社区驱动的创新。Wan2.2 [6] 采用混合专家（MoE）架构，利用两个 140 亿参数的专家模型来增强视频质量。虽然这种 MoE 架构通过利用不同去噪阶段的专门专家提高了视觉保真度，但它固有地引入了计算效率低下的问题，因为模型必须管理多个大型参数集（总计 270 亿参数，140 亿激活），导致显著的资源需求。尽管 Wan2.2 [6] 试图通过一个更紧凑的 50 亿参数变体来解决这个问题，该变体利用高压缩 3D VAE 减少内存占用，但这个轻量级模型仍然存在局限性。具体来说，其生成能力，特别是在保持帧间运动稳定性和实现专业应用所需的细微美学质量方面，仍然达不到实际需求。这种情况突显了一个关键差距：缺乏一个成功平衡高质量输出与高效推理的开源模型。

items.en: To address these challenges, we introduce HunyuanVideo 1.5, an open-source 8.3B video generation model designed to achieve state-of-the-art visual quality while maintaining high inference efficiency. Our framework is built on a two-stage pipeline for high-fidelity video synthesis. The first stage employs a Unified Diffusion Transformer (DiT) that supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation, producing initial video sequences with resolutions from 480p to 720p and durations of 5 to 10 seconds. The second stage utilizes a dedicated Video Super-Resolution Network to upscale the outputs to 1080p, significantly enhancing the final visual fidelity. The main contributions of this report are summarized as follows:
items.zh: 为了解决这些挑战，我们引入了 HunyuanVideo 1.5，一个开源的 83 亿参数视频生成模型，旨在实现最先进的视觉质量，同时保持高推理效率。我们的框架基于一个两阶段流水线进行高保真视频合成。第一阶段采用统一的扩散 Transformer（DiT），支持文本到视频和图像到视频生成，生成分辨率为 480p 到 720p、时长为 5 到 10 秒的初始视频序列。第二阶段利用专门的视频超分辨率网络将输出上采样到 1080p，显著增强最终的视觉保真度。本报告的主要贡献总结如下：

items.en: Lightweight High-Performance Architecture: We propose an efficient architecture that integrates an 8.3B-parameter Diffusion Transformer (DiT) with a 3D causal VAE, achieving compression ratios of 16× in spatial dimensions and 4× along the temporal axis. This design minimizes parameter count while fully leveraging the potential of the model, yielding performance comparable to state-of-the-art video generation models.
items.zh: 轻量级高性能架构：我们提出了一种高效架构，集成了 83 亿参数的扩散 Transformer（DiT）和 3D 因果 VAE，在空间维度上实现了 16 倍的压缩比，在时间轴上实现了 4 倍的压缩比。这种设计在充分利用模型潜力的同时最小化参数数量，实现了与最先进视频生成模型相当的性能。

items.en: Video Super-Resolution Enhancement: We develop an efficient few-step super-resolution network that upscales outputs to 1080p. It enhances sharpness while correcting distortions, thereby refining details and overall visual texture.
items.zh: 视频超分辨率增强：我们开发了一个高效的少步超分辨率网络，将输出上采样到 1080p。它在校正失真的同时增强清晰度，从而细化细节和整体视觉纹理。

items.en: Sparse Attention Optimization: We introduce a novel Selective and Sliding Tile Attention (SSTA) mechanism that dynamically prunes redundant spatiotemporal tokens. This significantly reduces computational overhead for long video sequences and accelerates inference, achieving an end-to-end speedup of 1.87×1.87\times in 10-second 720p video synthesis compared to FlashAttention-3 [7].
items.zh: 稀疏注意力优化：我们引入了一种新颖的选择性滑动块注意力（SSTA）机制，动态剪枝冗余的时空标记。这显著减少了长视频序列的计算开销并加速推理，与 FlashAttention-3 [7] 相比，在 10 秒 720p 视频合成中实现了 1.87 倍的端到端加速。

items.en: Enhanced Multimodal Understanding: Our framework utilizes a large multimodal model for precise bilingual (Chinese-English) understanding, combined with ByT5 for dedicated glyph encoding to enhance text generation accuracy in videos. Additionally, detailed bilingual captions are generated for both images and videos.
items.zh: 增强的多模态理解：我们的框架利用大型多模态模型进行精确的双语（中文-英文）理解，结合 ByT5 进行专门的字形编码，以增强视频中的文本生成准确性。此外，为图像和视频生成了详细的双语描述。

items.en: End-to-End Training Optimization: We demonstrate that the Muon optimizer [8] significantly accelerates convergence in video generation model training, while the multi-phase progressive training strategy—spanning from pre-training to post-training stages—enhances motion coherence, aesthetic quality, and alignment with human preferences, thereby enabling the production of professional-grade content.
items.zh: 端到端训练优化：我们证明了 Muon 优化器 [8] 显著加速了视频生成模型训练的收敛，而多阶段渐进式训练策略——从预训练到后训练阶段——增强了运动连贯性、美学质量和与人类偏好的对齐，从而能够生成专业级内容。

items.en: This report presents a comprehensive pipeline, beginning with meticulous data preparation—including curation, filtering, and captioning, as detailed in Section 2. Section 3 introduces the core architecture and key algorithms, such as the unified diffusion transformer, the video super-resolution network, and the mechanisms of sparse attention. Section 4 describes training strategies for text-to-video and image-to-video tasks, covering both pre-training and post-training methodologies. Finally, Section 5 provides a rigorous evaluation of the model’s performance against state-of-the-art models using quantitative metrics and qualitative benchmarks.
items.zh: 本报告介绍了一个全面的流水线，从精细的数据准备开始——包括整理、过滤和描述，详见第 2 节。第 3 节介绍了核心架构和关键算法，如统一的扩散 Transformer、视频超分辨率网络和稀疏注意力机制。第 4 节描述了文本到视频和图像到视频任务的训练策略，涵盖了预训练和后训练方法。最后，第 5 节使用定量指标和定性基准对模型性能进行了严格评估，与最先进模型进行了比较。

items.en: Our training dataset comprises both image and video data. For image data, we adopted the acquisition and processing pipeline outlined in [9], curating 5 billion images from a pool of over 10 billion for pre-training, with 1 billion reserved for subsequent stages. For video data, building upon the pipeline in [4], we significantly expanded the data volume while refining the filtering mechanisms to enhance quality. The specifics of these processes are detailed below.
items.zh: 我们的训练数据集包括图像和视频数据。对于图像数据，我们采用了 [9] 中概述的获取和处理流水线，从超过 100 亿张图像中精选了 50 亿张用于预训练，其中 10 亿张保留用于后续阶段。对于视频数据，基于 [4] 中的流水线，我们显著扩大了数据量，同时完善了过滤机制以提高质量。这些过程的具体细节如下所述。

items.en: Data Acquisition. To continuously improve the model’s performance, we prioritized diversity and quality during data acquisition. We sourced raw videos from a variety of channels, ensuring comprehensive coverage across diverse content, filming techniques, camera movements, styles, and scenarios. After basic deduplication and the removal of corrupted files, we obtained more than 10 million hours of raw video data.
items.zh: 数据获取。为了持续提高模型性能，我们在数据获取过程中优先考虑了多样性和质量。我们从各种渠道获取原始视频，确保涵盖多样化的内容、拍摄技术、摄像机运动、风格和场景。经过基本去重和删除损坏文件后，我们获得了超过 1000 万小时的原始视频数据。

items.en: To address the high variance in raw video lengths and optimize training efficiency, we segmented the videos into consistent clips ranging from 2 to 10 seconds. Specifically, we utilized PySceneDetect [10] combined with a custom segmentation operator to detect scene boundaries. To eliminate any remaining clips containing transition effects, we applied a secondary filtering stage using a specialized transition classifier.
items.zh: 为了解决原始视频长度的高方差问题并优化训练效率，我们将视频分割为 2 到 10 秒的一致片段。具体来说，我们利用 PySceneDetect [10] 结合自定义分割算子来检测场景边界。为了消除任何包含过渡效果的剩余片段，我们使用专门的过渡分类器进行了二次过滤阶段。

items.en: To mitigate artifacts such as subtitles, logos, and watermarks, we applied spatial cropping to exclude affected regions. To maintain compositional integrity, we discarded clips where the cropped area retained less than 60% of the original frame.
items.zh: 为了减轻字幕、标志和水印等伪影，我们应用了空间裁剪以排除受影响区域。为了保持构图完整性，我们丢弃了裁剪区域保留原始帧少于 60% 的片段。

items.en: Data Curation. To guarantee the high quality of our training data, we implemented a rigorous, multi-stage filtering pipeline. This pipeline consists of three distinct levels:
items.zh: 数据整理。为了保证训练数据的高质量，我们实施了一个严格的、多阶段的过滤流水线。该流水线包括三个不同的层次：

items.en: Basic Filtering: We employed specialized filters to remove videos with padding borders, stitching artifacts, grid layouts (collages), and static or low-motion scenes.
items.zh: 基本过滤：我们使用专门的过滤器去除带有填充边框、拼接伪影、网格布局（拼贴）以及静态或低运动场景的视频。

items.en: Visual Quality Filtering: We developed a comprehensive quality assessment operator that evaluates videos across four dimensions: sharpness, detail retention, noise & artifacts, and dynamic range. This allows us to discard clips with poor visual quality.
items.zh: 视觉质量过滤：我们开发了一个全面的质量评估算子，从四个维度评估视频：清晰度、细节保留、噪声和伪影以及动态范围。这使我们能够丢弃视觉质量较差的片段。

items.en: Aesthetic Filtering: We applied an aesthetic scoring operator based on [11] to evaluate the aesthetic quality of the videos, filtering out those with low aesthetic scores.
items.zh: 美学过滤：我们基于 [11] 应用了一个美学评分算子来评估视频的美学质量，过滤掉美学得分较低的片段。

items.en: Upon completion of these filtering stages, approximately 800 million high-quality video segments remained for pre-training.
items.zh: 完成这些过滤阶段后，大约有 8 亿个高质量视频片段保留用于预训练。

items.en: High-quality captions play a crucial role in video generation, significantly influencing precise instruction following and generation quality. To generate precise and comprehensive descriptions across diverse data modalities, we developed three specialized captioning models, each tailored for a specific function:
items.zh: 高质量描述在视频生成中起着至关重要的作用，显著影响精确的指令遵循和生成质量。为了跨不同数据模态生成精确且全面的描述，我们开发了三个专门的描述模型，每个模型针对特定功能定制：

items.en: Image Captioning: Generates descriptions for static images, leveraging the same methodology in HunyuanImage-3.0 [9].
items.zh: 图像描述：为静态图像生成描述，采用与 HunyuanImage-3.0 [9] 相同的方法。

items.en: Video Captioning: Produces a highly structured, multi-component description. These encompass multi-level textual narratives alongside a detailed set of cinematic and aesthetic properties (e.g., shot type, shot angle, composition, lighting, style, color palette, atmosphere).
items.zh: 视频描述：生成高度结构化、多组件的描述。这些描述包含多层次文本叙述以及一组详细的电影和美学属性（例如，镜头类型、镜头角度、构图、照明、风格、调色板、氛围）。

items.en: Image-to-Video (I2V) Instructional Captioning: This novel module generates text describing the temporal evolution or transformation from the initial frame, detailing changes in both foreground subjects and the background environment.
items.zh: 图像到视频（I2V）指令描述：这一新颖模块生成描述从初始帧开始的时间演变或变换的文本，详细说明前景主体和背景环境的变化。

items.en: Addressing the Richness-Hallucination Trade-off. A significant and persistent challenge in this domain is the inherent trade-off between descriptive richness and factual accuracy. Specifically, attempts to generate greater detail often increase the propensity for hallucination or factual inconsistencies. To overcome this, we integrate Reinforcement Learning (RL), specifically OPA-DPO [12], into our caption model post-training pipeline, as shown in Figure 1. This approach is designed to strike an optimal balance, maximizing descriptive detail while simultaneously minimizing hallucinations and factual errors.
items.zh: 解决丰富性与幻觉之间的权衡。该领域一个重大且持续的挑战是描述丰富性与事实准确性之间的固有权衡。具体来说，尝试生成更多细节往往会增加幻觉或事实不一致的倾向。为了克服这一点，我们将强化学习（RL），特别是OPA-DPO [12]，集成到我们的描述模型后训练流程中，如图1所示。这种方法旨在达到最佳平衡，最大化描述细节，同时最小化幻觉和事实错误。

items.capZh: 图1：描述模型后训练流程。

items.en: Camera Movement Description. We developed a specialized recognition model to analyze camera dynamics. This model is capable of identifying multiple camera movement types, operating at both a clip-level (for the whole video) and a sequential (over time) level. High-confidence predictions are converted into natural language descriptions and subsequently integrated into the structured video captions. The objective of this integration is to empower generative models with controllable camera movement.
items.zh: 摄像机运动描述。我们开发了一个专门的识别模型来分析摄像机动态。该模型能够识别多种摄像机运动类型，在片段级别（针对整个视频）和序列级别（随时间）上运行。高置信度的预测被转换为自然语言描述，随后集成到结构化视频描述中。此集成的目的是赋予生成模型可控的摄像机运动能力。

items.en: We propose a two-stage framework for high-fidelity video synthesis. In the first stage, we employ a diffusion transformer (DiT) model with 8.3 billion parameters, designed for multi-task learning. The architectural hyperparameters of HunyuanVideo 1.5 are detailed in Table 1. Subsequently, a video super-resolution network is utilized to further enhance visual quality. Comprehensive elaborations are provided in the following subsection.
items.zh: 我们提出了一个用于高保真视频合成的两阶段框架。在第一阶段，我们采用一个具有83亿参数的扩散Transformer（DiT）模型，专为多任务学习设计。HunyuanVideo 1.5的架构超参数详见表1。随后，利用视频超分辨率网络进一步提升视觉质量。以下小节提供全面阐述。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Architecture of the Unified Diffusion Transformer.

items.en: Multi-Task Training. We developed a unified architecture for jointly training text-to-image (T2I), text-to-video (T2V), and image-to-video (I2V) tasks. For the I2V task, the reference image is integrated into the model via two complementary strategies: (1) VAE-based encoding, where the image latent is concatenated with the noisy latent along the channel dimension to leverage its exceptional detail reconstruction capacity; and (2) SigLip-based feature extraction, where semantic embeddings are concatenated sequentially to enhance semantic alignment and strengthen instruction adherence in I2V generation. A learnable type embedding is introduced to explicitly distinguish between different types of conditions.
items.zh: 多任务训练。我们开发了一个统一架构，用于联合训练文本到图像（T2I）、文本到视频（T2V）和图像到视频（I2V）任务。对于I2V任务，参考图像通过两种互补策略集成到模型中：（1）基于VAE的编码，其中图像潜变量沿通道维度与噪声潜变量拼接，以利用其卓越的细节重建能力；（2）基于SigLip的特征提取，其中语义嵌入按顺序拼接，以增强语义对齐并加强I2V生成中的指令遵循。引入一个可学习的类型嵌入，以明确区分不同类型的条件。

items.en: VAE. We introduce a causal 3D transformer architecture designed for joint image-video encoding, which achieves a spatial compression ratio of 16×\times and a temporal compression ratio of 4×\times, with a latent channel dimension of 32.
items.zh: VAE。我们引入了一个因果3D Transformer架构，专为联合图像-视频编码设计，实现了16×的空间压缩比和4×的时间压缩比，潜变量通道维度为32。

items.en: Text encoder. The model employs a dual-channel text encoder, combining a general textual encoder. This design leverages a visual-language multimodal encoder Qwen2.5-VL [13] to achieve a deeper understanding of scene descriptions, character actions, and specific requirements. Additionally, the incorporation of a multilingual Glyph-ByT5 [14] text encoder further strengthens the model’s ability to render text accurately across various languages. This synergistic design enables the model to learn from both high-level semantic representations and fine-grained language-specific features, leading to a more comprehensive and robust text comprehension capability.
items.zh: 文本编码器。该模型采用双通道文本编码器，结合了一个通用文本编码器。该设计利用视觉-语言多模态编码器Qwen2.5-VL [13]实现对场景描述、角色动作和特定要求的更深入理解。此外，结合多语言Glyph-ByT5 [14]文本编码器进一步增强了模型跨多种语言准确渲染文本的能力。这种协同设计使模型能够从高层语义表示和细粒度语言特定特征中学习，从而获得更全面和稳健的文本理解能力。

items.en: Sparse Attention. The computational complexity of standard self-attention scales quadratically with sequence length, posing significant efficiency bottlenecks for transformer-based video generation models. Given the inherent spatiotemporal redundancy in video data, replacing full attention with sparse attention presents a well-motivated optimization strategy. To synergistically combine the benefits of static local window priors and dynamic global adaptive selection, we propose a novel sparse attention method termed SSTA (Selective and Sliding Tile Attention). SSTA features a parameter-free design, enabling seamless integration at any training stage. In our implementation, sparse training is incorporated during the distillation phase, which more effectively preserves output quality while maintaining high computational efficiency. The SSTA algorithm comprises four key steps, as described in Algorithm 1: 3D Block Partition, Selective Mask Generation, STA [15] Mask Generation and Block-Sparse Attention. We propose an engineered acceleration toolkit [16] for sparse attention mechanisms, utilizing the ThunderKittens [17] framework to efficiently implement the flex_block_attention algorithm.
items.zh: 稀疏注意力。标准自注意力的计算复杂度随序列长度呈二次方增长，给基于Transformer的视频生成模型带来了显著的效率瓶颈。鉴于视频数据中固有的时空冗余，用稀疏注意力替代全注意力是一个动机良好的优化策略。为了协同结合静态局部窗口先验和动态全局自适应选择的优势，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏注意力方法，称为SSTA（选择性和滑动块注意力）。SSTA具有无参数设计的特点，可在任何训练阶段无缝集成。在我们的实现中，稀疏训练在蒸馏阶段引入，这更有效地保持了输出质量，同时维持高计算效率。SSTA算法包括四个关键步骤，如算法1所述：3D块划分、选择性掩码生成、STA [15]掩码生成和块稀疏注意力。我们为稀疏注意力机制提出了一个工程加速工具包[16]，利用ThunderKittens [17]框架高效实现flex_block_attention算法。

items.en: Optimizer. The Muon optimizer [8] is used in this work to achieve faster convergence. We observe that it attains a lower training loss than AdamW in only half the number of training steps, while also yielding superior performance across multiple text-to-image benchmarks. To ensure training stability, a weight decay of 0.01 is applied.
items.zh: 优化器。本文使用Muon优化器[8]以实现更快的收敛。我们观察到，它在仅一半的训练步数内就达到了比AdamW更低的训练损失，同时在多个文本到图像基准测试中表现出更优的性能。为确保训练稳定性，应用了0.01的权重衰减。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The pipeline of a cascaded video super-resolution model.
items.capZh: 图3：级联视频超分辨率模型的流程。

items.en: To further improve training and inference efficiency while meeting the demand for high-resolution video generation, we introduce a cascaded Video Super-Resolution (VSR) model that enhances fine-grained visual details and textures in videos generated by text-to-video and image-to-video based models. We follow the architecture of the main model—an 8.3B Video Diffusion Transformer—and perform super-resolution in the latent space. We inject the LR latents using a channel concatenation approach. To spatially align the LR and HR latents, we separately train a latent upsample block. The final high-quality 1080p video is obtained by decoding these HR latents through the VAE decoder, as shown in Figure 3.
items.zh: 为了进一步提高训练和推理效率，同时满足高分辨率视频生成的需求，我们引入了一个级联视频超分辨率（VSR）模型，该模型增强了基于文本到视频和图像到视频模型生成的视频中的细粒度视觉细节和纹理。我们遵循主模型的架构——一个83亿参数的视频扩散Transformer——并在潜空间中进行超分辨率。我们使用通道拼接方法注入低分辨率潜变量。为了在空间上对齐低分辨率和高分辨率潜变量，我们单独训练了一个潜变量上采样块。最终的高质量1080p视频通过VAE解码器解码这些高分辨率潜变量获得，如图3所示。

items.en: We establish a robust and versatile foundation for HunyuanVideo 1.5 through a structured pre-training strategy that systematically develops core generative capabilities across multiple modalities. This phase employs a progressive, multi-stage approach encompassing text-to-image (T2I), text-to-video (T2V), and image-to-video (I2V) tasks. By scaling spatial resolution, temporal length, and frame rate progressively and leveraging mixed-task training with carefully balanced data ratios, we equip the model with strong semantic alignment, visual diversity, and temporal coherence, forming a solid base for subsequent specialization and refinement.
items.zh: 我们通过一个结构化的预训练策略为HunyuanVideo 1.5建立了稳健且多功能的基石，该策略系统地开发了跨多种模态的核心生成能力。这一阶段采用渐进式多阶段方法，涵盖文本到图像（T2I）、文本到视频（T2V）和图像到视频（I2V）任务。通过逐步扩展空间分辨率、时间长度和帧率，并利用精心平衡数据比率的混合任务训练，我们赋予模型强大的语义对齐、视觉多样性和时间连贯性，为后续的专业化和优化奠定了坚实基础。

items.en: T2I. We begin by training the T2I task, which includes two resolution stages (Stage I & II in Table 2): 256p and 512p. For each stage, we utilize training images with various aspect ratios and organize them into buckets to ensure efficient data sampling. The T2I task enables the model to learn robust semantic alignment between text and images, which we find significantly accelerates the convergence and performance of subsequent T2V & I2V training.
items.zh: T2I。我们首先训练T2I任务，包括两个分辨率阶段（表2中的阶段I和II）：256p和512p。对于每个阶段，我们使用具有各种宽高比的训练图像，并将其组织成桶以确保高效的数据采样。T2I任务使模型能够学习文本和图像之间的稳健语义对齐，我们发现这显著加速了后续T2V和I2V训练的收敛和性能。

items.en: T2V & I2V. Throughout the pretraining phase, we employ a mixed training regimen combining T2I, T2V, and I2V tasks, with a task ratio of 1:6:3. This configuration leverages large-scale T2I data to enhance semantic understanding and generative diversity, while ensuring sufficient video-specific modeling through T2V and I2V tasks. We adopt a progressive multi-stage strategy (Stages III to VI in Table 2), starting from 256p resolution at 16 fps and progressively advancing to 480p and 720p at 24 fps, with video durations ranging from 2 to 10 seconds. This structured scaling of spatiotemporal resolution facilitates stable convergence and strengthens the model’s capacity for detailed, coherent video synthesis. Similar to prior studies [18], we observe that flow matching-based training is particularly sensitive to the shift hyper-parameter when video token lengths vary across stages. To maintain training stability under such varying sequence conditions, we carefully design a series of shift scheduling strategies that adapt to different token lengths during the progressive training process.
items.zh: T2V和I2V。在整个预训练阶段，我们采用混合训练方案，结合T2I、T2V和I2V任务，任务比例为1:6:3。这种配置利用大规模T2I数据增强语义理解和生成多样性，同时通过T2V和I2V任务确保足够的视频特定建模。我们采用渐进式多阶段策略（表2中的阶段III至VI），从16 fps的256p分辨率开始，逐步推进到24 fps的480p和720p，视频时长从2秒到10秒不等。这种时空分辨率的结构化扩展促进了稳定收敛，并增强了模型生成详细、连贯视频的能力。与先前研究[18]类似，我们观察到基于流匹配的训练对移位超参数特别敏感，当视频令牌长度在不同阶段变化时。为了在这种变化的序列条件下保持训练稳定性，我们精心设计了一系列移位调度策略，以适应渐进训练过程中不同的令牌长度。

items.en: We conduct a comprehensive post-training pipeline to further enhance the generative quality and task-specific performance of HunyuanVideo 1.5. This multi-stage process consists of continuing training (CT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and human feedback alignment (RLHF), applied separately for text-to-video (T2V) and image-to-video (I2V) tasks. As shown in Figure 4, we present the visualization results during different post-training stages. By progressively refining the model distribution through these dedicated stages, we systematically steer the model toward the optimal output distribution for each task, significantly improving motion coherence, visual fidelity, and alignment with human preferences.
items.zh: 我们进行了全面的后训练流程，以进一步提升HunyuanVideo 1.5的生成质量和任务特定性能。这一多阶段过程包括继续训练（CT）、监督微调（SFT）和人类反馈对齐（RLHF），分别应用于文本到视频（T2V）和图像到视频（I2V）任务。如图4所示，我们展示了不同后训练阶段的可视化结果。通过这些专门阶段逐步优化模型分布，我们系统地引导模型朝向每个任务的最优输出分布，显著改善了运动连贯性、视觉保真度和与人类偏好的对齐。

items.en: CT. We conduct both CT and SFT stage in 480p and 720p resolution. In the CT stage, we leverage 1 million high-quality video clips per task (as detailed in Table 2, Stages VII & VIII), balanced across diverse categories and sourced from premium datasets. For T2V, we further prioritize clips with high dynamic motion to strengthen temporal modeling. For I2V, we introduce instructional captions that focus exclusively on describing motion and transformations compared to the first frame, thereby enhancing action fidelity. Both T2V and I2V CT processes are initialized from the same optimally pre-trained checkpoint, enabling both tasks to build upon a shared high-quality foundation.
items.zh: CT。我们在480p和720p分辨率下进行CT和SFT阶段。在CT阶段，我们每个任务使用100万个高质量视频片段（详见表2，阶段VII和VIII），这些片段在多样化类别中平衡，并来自优质数据集。对于T2V，我们进一步优先选择具有高动态运动的片段，以加强时间建模。对于I2V，我们引入指令描述，专注于描述与第一帧相比的运动和变换，从而增强动作保真度。T2V和I2V的CT过程都从相同的最优预训练检查点初始化，使两个任务都能建立在共享的高质量基础上。

items.en: SFT. During SFT, we utilize rigorously selected clips per task, filtered strictly considering aesthetic appeal, clarity, and motion smoothness. Through CT and SFT, we observe evident improvements in output stability, visual quality, aesthetic appeal, and temporal consistency for both generation tasks.
items.zh: SFT。在SFT期间，我们每个任务使用经过严格筛选的片段，严格考虑美学吸引力、清晰度和运动平滑度。通过CT和SFT，我们观察到两个生成任务在输出稳定性、视觉质量、美学吸引力和时间一致性方面都有明显改进。

items.en: RLHF. We employ Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) strategies tailored for our I2V and T2V tasks, both mainly aimed at correcting artifacts and enhancing motion quality.
items.zh: 基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）。我们采用针对I2V和T2V任务定制的基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）策略，两者主要旨在修正伪影并提升运动质量。

items.en: For the I2V task, we apply online reinforcement learning (RL) during post-training to correct structural and motion artifacts. Our approach begins with a curated prompt set spanning 100+ categories, constructed from high-aesthetic images. Candidate prompts are first generated via a vision-language model (VLM), then manually verified to ensure strict text-image consistency. We fine-tune a VLM-based reward model to evaluate videos across four key dimensions: text alignment, image alignment, visual quality, and motion dynamics. During RL training, we employ mixed sampling strategies by varying both random seeds and CFG scales, and adopt a hybrid ODE–SDE solver (MixGRPO [19]) to enrich exploration while maintaining sampling quality. This RLHF process yields consistent improvements across all evaluation metrics, with particularly notable gains in motion realism.
items.zh: 对于I2V任务，我们在后训练期间应用在线强化学习（RL）来修正结构和运动伪影。我们的方法从涵盖100多个类别的精选提示集开始，该提示集由高美学质量的图像构建。候选提示首先通过视觉语言模型（VLM）生成，然后手动验证以确保严格的文本-图像一致性。我们微调一个基于VLM的奖励模型，以评估视频的四个关键维度：文本对齐、图像对齐、视觉质量和运动动态。在RL训练期间，我们通过改变随机种子和CFG尺度采用混合采样策略，并采用混合ODE-SDE求解器（MixGRPO [19]）来丰富探索同时保持采样质量。这一RLHF过程在所有评估指标上带来一致的改进，尤其在运动真实感方面有显著提升。

items.en: Building on this, our T2V alignment strategy uses a more comprehensive hybrid offline-then-online approach, designed to address the increased complexity of T2V motion artifacts. We found that existing reward models struggle to effectively differentiate fine-grained motion quality. Therefore, we first conduct an offline optimization stage using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). For this, we curate a balanced O​(10​K)O(10K) prompt set (from LLMs-generated prompts and training video captions) covering diverse dimensions (motion, scene, subject, etc.). Using a selected high-quality SFT checkpoint, we generate N video candidates per prompt to create non-repetitive pairs. These pairs are manually annotated (GSB) for semantic fidelity, motion quality, and aesthetics. Applying Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) [20] to this high-quality paired data significantly reduces motion artifacts and establishes a superior policy starting point. Finally, we conduct an online optimization stage, adopting the exact same online RL framework developed for I2V to further enhance the model’s visual quality and semantic-text alignment.
items.zh: 在此基础上，我们的T2V对齐策略采用更全面的混合离线-在线方法，旨在解决T2V运动伪影增加的复杂性。我们发现现有的奖励模型难以有效区分细粒度的运动质量。因此，我们首先使用直接偏好优化（DPO）进行离线优化阶段。为此，我们整理了一个平衡的O(10K)提示集（来自LLM生成的提示和训练视频字幕），涵盖多个维度（运动、场景、主体等）。使用选定的高质量SFT检查点，我们为每个提示生成N个视频候选以创建非重复对。这些对由人工标注（GSB）语义保真度、运动质量和美学。将直接偏好优化（DPO）[20]应用于这些高质量配对数据显著减少了运动伪影，并建立了更优的策略起点。最后，我们进行在线优化阶段，采用为I2V开发的完全相同的在线RL框架，以进一步增强模型的视觉质量和语义-文本对齐。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Visualization during different post-training stages
items.capZh: 图4：不同后训练阶段的可视化结果

items.en: We begin by initializing the weights of our video super-resolution model with a pretrained T2V video model to ensure effective training. For dataset construction, a diverse collection comprising 1 million high-quality video clips is curated. These clips span a wide range of scenarios and resolutions from 1K to 4K, each lasting between 3 and 10 seconds at 24 frames per second. In addition to video data, a set of high-resolution images is incorporated during training to enhance the model’s capability to generate fine visual details.
items.zh: 我们首先用预训练的T2V视频模型初始化视频超分辨率模型的权重，以确保有效训练。在数据集构建方面，我们整理了一个包含100万个高质量视频片段的多样化集合。这些片段涵盖从1K到4K的广泛场景和分辨率，每个片段以24帧/秒的速度持续3到10秒。除了视频数据，训练中还加入了一组高分辨率图像，以增强模型生成精细视觉细节的能力。

items.en: For input preparation, we concatenate the low-resolution latents and noise along the channel dimension as input to the DiT model. All weights of the video super-resolution model are fully trainable throughout the training process, following the flow matching paradigm. As shown in Figure 5, our method significantly enhances visual quality, motion stability, and overall temporal coherence.
items.zh: 在输入准备方面，我们将低分辨率潜变量和噪声沿通道维度拼接作为DiT模型的输入。视频超分辨率模型的所有权重在整个训练过程中都是完全可训练的，遵循流匹配范式。如图5所示，我们的方法显著提升了视觉质量、运动稳定性和整体时间一致性。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Visualization results of the cascaded video super-resolution model.
items.capZh: 图5：级联视频超分辨率模型的可视化结果。

items.en: We adopt two evaluation methods: Rating and GSB (Good/Same/Bad). The Rating method provides a comprehensive assessment of the model from multiple perspectives, enabling us to better diagnose its shortcomings. The GSB approach is widely used to evaluate the relative performance of two models based on overall video perception quality.
items.zh: 我们采用两种评估方法：评分法和GSB（好/相同/差）。评分法从多个角度对模型进行全面评估，使我们能够更好地诊断其缺点。GSB方法广泛用于基于整体视频感知质量评估两个模型的相对性能。

items.en: As shown in Table 3 and Table 4, we assess text-to-video generation using a comprehensive rating methodology that considers five key dimensions: text-video consistency, aesthetic quality of individual frames, visual quality, structural stability, and motion effects. For image-to-video generation, the evaluation encompasses image-video consistency, instruction responsiveness, visual quality, structural stability, and motion effects.
items.zh: 如表3和表4所示，我们使用综合评分方法评估文本到视频生成，考虑五个关键维度：文本-视频一致性、单帧美学质量、视觉质量、结构稳定性和运动效果。对于图像到视频生成，评估包括图像-视频一致性、指令响应性、视觉质量、结构稳定性和运动效果。

items.en: This systematic evaluation framework enables us to quickly diagnose model shortcomings and identify specific areas for improvement. By analyzing performance across these dimensions, we can effectively guide optimization efforts to enhance overall model quality and ensure the generated videos better fulfill task requirements.
items.zh: 这一系统评估框架使我们能够快速诊断模型缺点并确定需要改进的具体领域。通过分析这些维度的性能，我们可以有效指导优化工作，以提升整体模型质量，确保生成的视频更好地满足任务要求。

items.en: In our experiments, we carefully construct 300 diverse text prompts and 300 image samples to cover balanced application scenarios for both text-to-video and image-to-video tasks. For each prompt or image input, an equal number of video samples are generated by each model in a single run to ensure comparability. To maintain fairness, inference is performed only once per input without any cherry-picking of results. All competing models are evaluated using their default configurations. The evaluation is conducted by over 100 professional assessors. The results are shown in Table 5 and 6.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们精心构建了300个多样化的文本提示和300个图像样本，以覆盖文本到视频和图像到视频任务的平衡应用场景。对于每个提示或图像输入，每个模型在单次运行中生成相同数量的视频样本以确保可比性。为保持公平性，每个输入仅执行一次推理，不进行任何结果挑选。所有竞争模型均使用其默认配置进行评估。评估由超过100名专业评估员进行。结果如表5和表6所示。

full.sec: 6 Inference Speed and GPU Memory Requirements

items.en: This section presents a comprehensive analysis of the inference speed and memory requirements for HunyuanVideo 1.5 under various configurations. All speed measurements are conducted on the classifier-free guidance (CFG) distilled model using 8 NVIDIA H800 GPUs with context parallelism enabled across all devices.
items.zh: 本节对HunyuanVideo 1.5在不同配置下的推理速度和内存需求进行全面分析。所有速度测量均在无分类器引导（CFG）蒸馏模型上进行，使用8块NVIDIA H800 GPU，并在所有设备上启用上下文并行。

items.en: To better demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed sparse attention mechanism, we evaluate inference speed without engineering-level acceleration. No engineering-level acceleration or custom optimization is applied beyond the described model methods and standard distributed inference. All reported results reflect unoptimized, out-of-the-box research code performance. For configurations without sparse attention, Flash Attention v3 [7] is adopted as the attention backend. Inference speed is measured as the wall-clock time per diffusion step, averaged across multiple runs. Table 7 presents the inference speed results under different configurations. It can be observed that without engineering acceleration, the model already achieves competitive inference speeds. This is attributed to the compact 8.3B-parameter architecture that is intrinsically efficient and the high VAE compression rate that significantly reduces the number of tokens required for computation. In addition, sparse attention effectively reduces inference time for long-context sequences, particularly evident in the configurations of 241 frames in Table 7.
items.zh: 为了更好地展示所提出的稀疏注意力机制的有效性，我们在没有工程级加速的情况下评估推理速度。除了所描述的模型方法和标准分布式推理外，未应用任何工程级加速或自定义优化。所有报告的结果均反映未优化的、开箱即用的研究代码性能。对于没有稀疏注意力的配置，采用Flash Attention v3 [7]作为注意力后端。推理速度以每个扩散步骤的挂钟时间测量，并多次运行取平均值。表7展示了不同配置下的推理速度结果。可以看出，在没有工程加速的情况下，模型已经实现了具有竞争力的推理速度。这归功于紧凑的8.3B参数架构本身的高效性，以及高VAE压缩率显著减少了计算所需的token数量。此外，稀疏注意力有效减少了长上下文序列的推理时间，在表7中241帧的配置下尤为明显。

items.en: We also evaluate inference speed with basic engineering-level acceleration techniques enabled to demonstrate practical performance achievable in real-world deployment scenarios. Please note that in this experiment, we do not pursue the most extreme acceleration at the cost of generation quality, but rather to achieve notable speed improvements while maintaining nearly identical output quality. Several acceleration techniques are employed in this experiment: SageAttention [21] is adopted for attention operations to reduce memory complexity and improve computational efficiency; the DiT is compiled using PyTorch’s torch.compile to enable kernel fusion and operator optimization; a feature caching mechanism is implemented during diffusion sampling to reuse cached intermediate features for non-critical steps, reducing redundant computations. To better reflect practical performance, we report the total inference time for 50 diffusion steps. The results are presented in Table 8. It can be observed that even with engineering acceleration techniques enabled, sparse attention further reduces the inference time for long-context sequences, demonstrating its effectiveness in complementing engineering optimizations.
items.zh: 我们还评估了启用基本工程级加速技术后的推理速度，以展示在实际部署场景中可实现的性能。请注意，在本实验中，我们并不追求以牺牲生成质量为代价的最极端加速，而是希望在保持几乎相同输出质量的同时实现显著的加速。本实验中采用了多种加速技术：采用SageAttention [21]进行注意力操作以减少内存复杂度并提高计算效率；使用PyTorch的torch.compile编译DiT以实现内核融合和算子优化；在扩散采样过程中实现特征缓存机制，以重用非关键步骤的缓存中间特征，减少冗余计算。为了更好地反映实际性能，我们报告了50个扩散步骤的总推理时间。结果如表8所示。可以看出，即使启用了工程加速技术，稀疏注意力进一步减少了长上下文序列的推理时间，证明了其在补充工程优化方面的有效性。

items.en: The GPU memory requirements are contingent upon the hardware configuration and the employment of offloading techniques. All memory measurements reported herein are conducted on a single GPU configuration. When pipeline offloading, group offloading, and VAE tiling are enabled, the entire pipeline can complete end-to-end inference for 720p 121-frame T2V/I2V generation with a peak memory of 13.6 GB, thereby enabling inference on a single consumer-grade GPU (e.g., RTX 4090).
items.zh: GPU内存需求取决于硬件配置和卸载技术的使用。本文报告的所有内存测量均在单GPU配置下进行。当启用流水线卸载、组卸载和VAE分块时，整个流水线可以端到端完成720p 121帧T2V/I2V生成的推理，峰值内存为13.6 GB，从而可以在单块消费级GPU（例如RTX 4090）上进行推理。

items.en: In this report, we present HunyuanVideo 1.5, a compact 8.3B-parameter Diffusion Transformer (DiT) for open-source video generation that competes with leading proprietary systems. Built via progressive training from a text-to-image model, it achieves high-quality text-to-video and image-to-video synthesis through meticulous data curation and a multi-stage pipeline. The efficient DiT framework integrates SSTA for accelerated inference and a dedicated video super-resolution network for high-resolution output, ensuring state-of-the-art visual quality, motion coherence, and strong multimodal alignment. HunyuanVideo 1.5 exhibits exceptional bilingual prompt understanding, accurate text rendering, and reliable instruction-following. Comprehensive evaluations confirm it sets a new standard among open-source video generators. By releasing this high-performance, lightweight model, we provide an accessible foundation to lower barriers for creative and research applications, fostering broader exploration and innovation.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了HunyuanVideo 1.5，一个紧凑的8.3B参数扩散Transformer（DiT），用于开源视频生成，可与领先的专有系统竞争。通过从文本到图像模型逐步训练构建，它通过精细的数据整理和多阶段流水线实现了高质量的文本到视频和图像到视频合成。高效的DiT框架集成了SSTA以加速推理，以及专用的视频超分辨率网络以实现高分辨率输出，确保了最先进的视觉质量、运动连贯性和强大的多模态对齐。HunyuanVideo 1.5表现出卓越的双语提示理解、准确的文本渲染和可靠的指令遵循。全面评估证实它在开源视频生成器中树立了新标准。通过发布这一高性能、轻量级模型，我们为创意和研究应用提供了可访问的基础，降低了门槛，促进了更广泛的探索和创新。
